headline: Eastman Chemical (EMN) Stock Trades At A Discount On Cash Flow But Near Fair Value On Earnings
summary: Eastman Chemical stock is coming off a difficult stretch, with the share price down about 25% over the past 5 years, yet the latest intrinsic value work using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach points to the shares trading at a steep discount to that estimate. At the same time, market based valuation checks using earnings and other multiples suggest the stock is priced roughly in line with peers. This contrast creates a clear tension for investors trying to judge value today. Over the...
